content_rules: Do not generate parenting scripts at runtime.
Only retrieve approved cards from this library.
Displayed scripts, action cards, helpful notes, and safety notes use universal language whenever possible.
Hidden search_terms may include words parents type, including relationship words, to improve retrieval.
Use connection plus accountability. Avoid shame, labels, forced confessions, and power struggles.
